AdviceAthleteProfile.title: AdviceAthleteProfile
AdviceAthleteProfile.description: Profile values and optional configured targets used by analysis.

AnalysisWindow.title: AnalysisWindow
AnalysisWindow.description: The one inclusive local-calendar window used by every source.

AthleteMetrics.title: AthleteMetrics
AthleteMetrics.description: Latest athlete-level metrics such as FTP and max heart rate.

fat_free_mass_kg.title: Fat Free Mass Kg
fat_free_mass_kg.description: Fat-free mass (muscles, bones, tissues) in kilograms

moving_average_7d.description: 7-day moving averages for the measurement metrics

BodyMeasurement.title: BodyMeasurement
BodyMeasurement.description: A human-readable representation of body measurements from a smart scale.

weight_kg.title: Weight Kg
weight_kg.description: 7-day average of body weight in kilograms

fat_mass_kg.title: Fat Mass Kg
fat_mass_kg.description: 7-day average of total fat mass in kilograms

muscle_mass_kg.title: Muscle Mass Kg
muscle_mass_kg.description: 7-day average of skeletal muscle mass in kilograms

bone_mass_kg.title: Bone Mass Kg
bone_mass_kg.description: 7-day average of bone mass in kilograms

hydration_kg.title: Hydration Kg
hydration_kg.description: 7-day average of body water content in kilograms

fat_free_mass_kg.title: Fat Free Mass Kg
fat_free_mass_kg.description: 7-day average of fat-free mass (muscles, bones, tissues) in kilograms

BodyMeasurementsResponse.title: BodyMeasurementsResponse
BodyMeasurementsResponse.description: Collection of measurements with derived linear regression trends.

BodyMetricTrends.title: BodyMetricTrends
BodyMetricTrends.description: Linear regression trends for core body metrics.

net_intake_after_recorded_exercise_kcal.title: Net Intake After Recorded Exercise Kcal

screening_energy_availability_kcal_per_k.title: Screening Energy Availability Kcal Per Kg Ffm

DailyNutritionSummaryWithEntries.title: DailyNutritionSummaryWithEntries
DailyNutritionSummaryWithEntries.description: Daily summary extended with the list of individual entries.

LinearRegressionResult.title: LinearRegressionResult
LinearRegressionResult.description: Slope, intercept, and coefficient of determination for a metric.

start_time.title: Start Time
start_time.description: UTC timestamp when the workout began.

duration_minutes.title: Duration Minutes
duration_minutes.description: Total session duration expressed in minutes.

average_heartrate.title: Average Heartrate
average_heartrate.description: Average heart rate recorded for the session.

max_heartrate.title: Max Heartrate
max_heartrate.description: Maximum heart rate recorded for the session.

calories.title: Calories
calories.description: Estimated calories expended during the session.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Free-form notes or description of the workout.

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional numeric identifier used for deduplicating entries.

weighted_average_watts.title: Weighted Average Watts
weighted_average_watts.description: Optional weighted average power in watts.

tss.title: Tss
tss.description: Optional Training Stress Score if already calculated.

intensity_factor.title: Intensity Factor
intensity_factor.description: Optional intensity factor if already calculated.

hr_drift_percent.title: Hr Drift Percent
hr_drift_percent.description: Optional heart rate drift percentage estimate.

vo2max_minutes.title: Vo2Max Minutes
vo2max_minutes.description: Optional minutes spent at/above VO₂ max intensity.

ManualWorkoutSubmission.title: ManualWorkoutSubmission
ManualWorkoutSubmission.description: Payload describing a manually logged workout extracted by a GPT agent.

NumericDistribution.title: NumericDistribution
NumericDistribution.description: Descriptive statistics for one recorded-day nutrition series.

NutritionCoverage.title: NutritionCoverage
NutritionCoverage.description: Coverage facts for the requested nutrition window.

NutritionDayAnalysis.title: NutritionDayAnalysis
NutritionDayAnalysis.description: Nutrition evidence for exactly one calendar day.

page_id.title: Page Id
page_id.description: Unique identifier of the corresponding Notion page

NutritionSummaryResponse.title: NutritionSummaryResponse
NutritionSummaryResponse.description: Time contextualized response containing one or more daily summaries.

NutritionTargetComparison.title: NutritionTargetComparison
NutritionTargetComparison.description: Available nutrition target comparisons, without qualitative labels.

NutritionTargetMetric.title: NutritionTargetMetric
NutritionTargetMetric.description: Comparison of a target against recorded past-day values.

status.title: Status
status.description: Short status indicator for the operation outcome.

id.title: Id
id.description: Identifier of the resource affected by the operation, when relevant.

OperationStatus.title: OperationStatus
OperationStatus.description: Normalized status payload returned by mutation endpoints.

SourceStatus.title: SourceStatus
SourceStatus.description: Availability and safe diagnostics for one upstream source.

SummaryAdvice.description: Combined nutrition, body metrics, workout data, and athlete metrics.

page_id.title: Page Id
page_id.description: Unique identifier of the Notion page
